parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json;
return [{json:{
  document_id: d.id,
  status: 'validation_failed',
  validation_status: 'failed',
  repair_required: true,
  write_performed: false,
  attempt: 1,
  errors: d.validation.errors,
  document: d.canonical_output,
  registry_entry: d.registry_entry,
  required_sections: d.required_sections,
  minimum_words: d.minimum_words,
  dependencies: d.dependencies,
  pipeline: d.pipeline,
  context: d.context,
  note: 'WF-03 remains separately invoked; no automatic repair routing is configured.'
}}];
